error.signature: System prompt leaked via prompt injection — user input not sanitized

verdict.summary: Adversarial user input can leak system prompts or override behavior.

dead_ends.action: Filter exact phrase ignore previous instructions
dead_ends.why_fails: Trivially bypassed by rephrasing, unicode tricks, or multilingual variants

dead_ends.action: Put system prompt at the end of context
dead_ends.why_fails: LLMs attend to all positions; placement alone does not prevent extraction

workarounds.action: Use a separate system message role and enforce input/output guardrails
workarounds.how: Use role:system for instructions + apply output filtering

workarounds.action: Implement layered defense: input sanitization + output filtering + canary tokens
workarounds.how: Add unique canary string to system prompt; monitor outputs for its presence
